'''hanguzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycocide|mycocide]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ng-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycocide|mycocide]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hanguzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hængizhith|hængizhith]] || [[word:hængizhij|hængizhij]] || [[word:hængizhish|hængizhish]] || [[word:hængizhi|hængizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hangunguzhuth|hangunguzhuth]] || [[word:hangunguzhuj|hangunguzhuj]] || [[word:hangunguzhush|hangunguzhush]] || [[word:hangunguzhu|hangunguzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hanguzhuth|hanguzhuth]] || [[word:hanguzhuj|hanguzhuj]] || [[word:hanguzhush|hanguzhush]] || [[word:hanguzhu|hanguzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hangufzhuth|hangufzhuth]] || [[word:hangufzhuj|hangufzhuj]] || [[word:hangufzhush|hangufzhush]] || [[word:hangufzhuf|hangufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hanguzhuthu|hanguzhuthu]] || [[word:hanguzhuju|hanguzhuju]] || [[word:hanguzhushu|hanguzhushu]] || [[word:hanguzhuku|hanguzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hanguzhuth|hanguzhuth]] || [[word:hanguzhuj|hanguzhuj]] || [[word:hanguzhush|hanguzhush]] || [[word:hanguzhu|hanguzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hanguzhuthul|hanguzhuthul]] || [[word:hanguzhujul|hanguzhujul]] || [[word:hanguzhushul|hanguzhushul]] || [[word:hanguzhukul|hanguzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hanguzhuthuthu|hanguzhuthuthu]] || [[word:hanguzhujuju|hanguzhujuju]] || [[word:hanguzhushushu|hanguzhushushu]] || [[word:hanguzhuku|hanguzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hanguzhuthun|hanguzhuthun]] || [[word:hanguzhujun|hanguzhujun]] || [[word:hanguzhushun|hanguzhushun]] || [[word:hanguzhukun|hanguzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hanguzhuthuoro|hanguzhuthuoro]] || [[word:hanguzhujuoro|hanguzhujuoro]] || [[word:hanguzhushuoro|hanguzhushuoro]] || [[word:hanguzhukuoro|hanguzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
